sql_array: CREATE TABLE polygons (id INT PRIMARY KEY, shape GEOMETRY);
SELECT id, ST_ExteriorRing(shape) FROM polygons WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM polygons WHERE id <= 2);
SELECT ST_ExteriorRing (shape) FROM polygons WHERE shape NOT IN (SELECT shape FROM polygons WHERE id = 3);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) OVER (PARTITION BY id) AS cnt FROM polygons HAVING cnt NOT IN (1, 2);
SELECT id, ST_ExteriorRing(shape) AS exterior FROM polygons WHERE exterior NOT IN (SELECT ST_ExteriorRing(shape) FROM polygons WHERE id = 1) AND exterior IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE temp_polys AS SELECT id, shape FROM polygons WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM polygons WHERE id = 3);
SELECT id, ST_ExteriorRing(NULLIF(shape, 'POLYGON EMPTY')) FROM polygons WHERE id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM temp_polys) ORDER BY id;
